member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Converters.InvertedBoolConverter
member.summary: Inverts boolean values for IsEnabled bindings.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Converters.StringNotEmptyConverter
member.summary: Returns true when a string is not null or whitespace.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Models.FoodCategories
member.summary: Food category constants used for filtering and classification.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Models.FoodItem
member.summary: Represents nutritional information for a food item returned from the API.

member.name: M:FoodNutritionApp.Models.FoodItem.ToSpeechSummary
member.summary: Builds a spoken summary for text-to-speech accessibility.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Models.HistoryRecord
member.summary: SQLite entity for saved scan and search history.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Platforms.Android.AndroidLightSensorService
member.summary: Android ambient light sensor used to trigger flashlight in dark environments.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Platforms.Android.AndroidSpeechPlaybackService
member.summary: Android native TTS with explicit engine init (avoids MAUI "Failed to initialize Text to Speech engine").

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Platforms.Android.AndroidSpeechRecognitionService
member.summary: Uses the system speech UI (RecognizerIntent) first, then in-app SpeechRecognizer — more reliable on real devices.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.AppSettingsService
member.summary: Persists theme and font scale preferences and applies them app-wide.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.DatabaseService
member.summary: SQLite persistence for scan and search history records.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.DefaultLightSensorService
member.summary: Default light sensor implementation for platforms without a dedicated sensor API. Returns a moderate light level so flash auto-enable can be demonstrated manually.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.HybridNutritionApi
member.summary: Nutrition lookup chain: bundled local data → USDA API → mock API fallback.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.ILightSensorService
member.summary: Reads ambient light level from the device sensor when available.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.INutritionApi
member.summary: Contract for fetching food nutrition data from a remote or mock source.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.ISpeechPlaybackService
member.summary: Cross-platform speech playback with reliable stop support (especially on Windows).

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.ISpeechRecognitionService
member.summary: Speech-to-text for food name search (voice input).

member.name: M:FoodNutritionApp.Services.ISpeechRecognitionService.RecognizeFoodNameAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns recognized text, or null if nothing was heard / user cancelled.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.LocalFirstNutritionApi
member.summary: Dual-insurance data strategy: local bundled data first, mock API second.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.LocalFoodDataService
member.summary: Loads bundled local JSON food data — queried before any remote mock API.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.MauiSpeechRecognitionService
member.summary: Speech recognition via CommunityToolkit (iOS / fallback).

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.MauiTextToSpeechPlaybackService
member.summary: Text-to-speech via MAUI (Android / iOS). Runs on main thread for device compatibility.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.MockNutritionApi
member.summary: Mock nutrition API with predefined foods for development and emulator testing. Simulates OCR/vision by mapping image hash to a food name.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.RealNutritionApi
member.summary: USDA FoodData Central search. Returns null when offline or no match (caller uses mock fallback).

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.Services.SpeechPermissionHelper
member.summary: Ensures microphone permission for speech-to-text on Android and other platforms.

member.name: T:FoodNutritionApp.ViewModels.BaseViewModel
member.summary: Base class for all ViewModels with busy state and title support.

member.name: F:FoodNutritionApp.ViewModels.CameraViewModel.captureAndRecognizeCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:FoodNutritionApp.ViewModels.CameraViewModel.CaptureAndRecognizeCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: M:FoodNutritionApp.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.StopReading
member.summary: Synchronous stop — can run while is still awaiting.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .
